name: Weintraubentorte (Grape Torte)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-size bowl, sift flour and sugar. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
2. Add egg, egg yolk, lemon rind, and salt; mix with a fork to form dough. Cover and let rest in refrigerator for 20 minutes.
3. Roll out dough into a circle and place it in an ungreased springform pan. Form a 1-inch high rim.
4. Bake at preheated 350 degree F oven for 10 minutes.
5. Meanwhile, clean and halve the grapes, removing seeds if necessary.
6. Beat egg whites until stiff. Blend in sugar, lemon juice, and ground almonds.
7. Carefully fold in the grapes.
8. Remove cake from the oven. Fill baked cake shell with grape mixture, return to the oven, and bake for another 30 minutes at 350 degrees F.
9. Remove cake from pan and cool on wire rack.
